---
title: "Homework 2"
author: "Jordan Sutherland"
date: "1/27/2022"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
data=matrix(c(48,40,31,69,72,54,30,51,64),nrow=3,ncol=3,byrow=TRUE)
chisq.test(data)
model<-chisq.test(data)
model$stdres
```


```{r}

```
